candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; clearly represents total revenue/sales.
Current deferred revenue is a liability, not total revenue; not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the clear top-line revenue figure.

candidates.why: Represents direct cost of inventory/production; best match for cost of goods sold.
Adjustment to inventory, may be part of COGS but not the main COGS line; less direct than raw materials and finished goods.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and finished goods - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/plug line, not a standalone economic COGS component.

variables.notes: Using the main production cost line as COGS; ignoring inventory change and balancing plug for simplicity.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A component representing personnel/overhead costs.
Broad operating overhead bucket, excluding COGS and D&A; fits SG&A.
Smaller explicit operating expense line; also SG&A-type overhead.
Share-based comp is typically included within SG&A; should be captured as a component.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset; not a period SG&A expense.
Liability related to wage expenses, which are SG&A-type costs; but this is a stock, not the expense line itself.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit income statement operating overhead components; excluded balance-sheet-only items.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled research & development expense.

variables.notes: R&D is provided as a supplemental income statement line; use it directly.

candidates.row_label: Gain on remeasurement of previously held equity interest in business combination
candidates.why: Fair value gain on equity interest, not an interest (finance cost) line.
Primary interest expense line in the financial expenses section; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a secondary, more specific interest expense line.
Represents allocation of profit to minority shareholders; not interest expense.
Earnings attributable to non-controlling interests; not interest expense.
Line exists but appears unused (all nan); conceptually an aggregate interest net line, but not populated here.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; tertiary interest line.
Debt balance, not an interest expense flow.
Debt balance, not an interest expense flow.
Debt balance, not an interest expense flow.
Debt balance, not an interest expense flow.
Equity attributable to minority interests; not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense-related lines, starting with the main Interest Expenses row.

candidates.row_label: Gain on remeasurement of previously held equity interest in business combination
candidates.why: Income statement gain; not an equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Gain From Fair Value Measurement of Equity Instruments
candidates.why: Income statement fair value gain; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Loss From Fair Value Measurement of Equity Instruments
candidates.why: Income statement fair value loss; not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity instruments
candidates.why: OCI fair value change; not an equity total itself.
Financial asset category, not shareholders’ equity.
Component of equity (contributed capital) but not total equity on its own.
Another equity component (retained & reserves) but not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Represents total equity of common shareholders, excluding non-controlling interests; strong candidate for book equity.
Represents total equity including non-controlling interests; best single representation of book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Use total Equity (including minorities) as primary book equity; provide owners’ equity as secondary option.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to NCI; a flow, not the balance sheet minority interest.
Also income statement allocation to NCI; again a flow, not equity balance.
Balance sheet line representing minority interest / non-controlling interests in equity; matches MIB definition.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet Non-controlling interests as the minority interest (MIB) stock variable.
